description: The Pelle 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy, founded in the 1970s by Antonio Pelle. It is one of the most influential 'ndrine, involved in international cocaine trafficking, extortion, and contract rigging. The clan has members in the 'Ndrangheta's top management bodies and maintains a presence in Lombardy. It has been implicated in corrupting regional elections and has ongoing rivalries with the Nirta-Strangio clan.

country_links.evidence_quote: it has contacts with the Colombian drug cartels
country_links.context: The clan has contacts with Colombian drug cartels for cocaine trafficking.
